concept.domains: (topic concept) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c concept oceConcept-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
concept.title: 05 The process of the printhead carriage

abstract.p: The function of the carriage is simply put the following

li.p: Provide a stable speed for the printhead carriage movement.
Provide the means for different speeds.
Provide information on the current position of the printhead carriage.

section.title: Aerosol collection units
section.p: To reduce the aerosol pollution in the printing area, the print carriage is equipped with two aerosol collection units.
On each side of the print carriage a chamber is placed with a filter and a fan.
When the carriage is moving the trailing fan will be switched on to transport the air above the print surface/medium upwards through the filter.
The filters must be replaced regularly by the operator (KOM part).
Each set of filters has an unique validation code which is needed during the replacement procedure.
This code can be used to check that a customer is using genuine Canon parts and that the filters are replaced regularly.
In PRISMAservice you can easily see in the "Consumables replacement" technical view whether a genuine code had been entered (green = ok, red = nok).,
In case a customer is using always the same code, the value will become orange.

section.title: Movement and Drive
section.p: The printhead carriage must move over the media from left to right and back. This movement makes it possible to print. The different print modes require a different speed for the carriage. The direction from the left to the right is called the Y direction in the system. The home position of the printhead carriage is at the right hand side.
3 Guidance cleaners (felt) with oil are positioned on the printhead carriage. They take care of the lubrication. There is no need to replace these lubricators on a regular base.
The home position is detected by the Y motion system carriage home sensor 05B1 YMS_CAR_HOME_SE.
There is one drive belt, and this belt is connected to the carriage on the left and right hand sides.

The Y motion system carriage motor 05M1 YMS_CAR_MO drives this belt and is installed on the right hand side. To improve Print Quality (vertical banding): Alignment of the motor is more lined up with the drive belt and the fitting of the pulley on the motor is changed to reduce vibrations.

section.title: Location
section.p: The position and speed of the printhead carriage is important to the process. There is a sensor on the left side of the carriage to determine the current position and speed. This is Y motion system carriage ruler encoder 05PBA03 YMS_CAR_RUL_ENC.

The sensor uses a ruler. This ruler is installed below the carriage. The ruler is installed from the left hand side to the right hand side. During the movement of the carriage, the ruler encoder is used always, to check the speed and the position.

section.title: Cooling
section.p: Cooling of the printheads is done by a fan called Y motion system carriage cool 1 fan 05M2 YMS_CAR_COOL1_FAN. The cooling fan is switched on, at a fixed speed, during printing.
For a proper cooling of the printheads heatsink the fan is blowing towards the print heads.
